Frequently Asked Questions

Quick answers to common customer questions.

How do I order Hudood products?

Click any Order Now button on this page to open WhatsApp and chat directly with Salman Enterprises. Fast and easy!

What is included in the ₹156 pack?

₹50 Hudood Membership (6 months validity) + ₹70 SLS-Free Toothpaste (100g) + ₹36 Quality Soap + Lucky Draw prize chance!

What are the Lucky Draw prizes?

1st Prize: Electric Scooter, 2nd Prize: Fridge, 3rd Prize: Air Cooler. Ask us on WhatsApp for the latest draw date details.

Is delivery available in my area?

Yes! We deliver in Vijayapur and nearby areas. WhatsApp us your address to confirm delivery availability.

What makes Hudood Toothpaste special?

It has a unique blend of 14 precious herbs including Neem, Clove and Calcium for 24-hour protection — protective, corrective and curative.
